name: Cycle
northStar: Ink-stained porcelain workshop with jewel-toned labels

dos: Use #000000 fill + #ffffff text for the single primary action on any screen; never introduce a second filled-CTA color in the same viewport.

Pair each deep brand accent (#38296c, #004d60, #6c4800, #46122d) with its matching tinted wash — violet text on #f5f0ff, teal on #defafe, amber on #fff6e1, maroon on apricot wash — to keep the categorical system legible.
Set all display headlines in Eudoxus Sans 700–800 with tracking between -0.026em and -0.035em; never use Inter above 27px.
Use 20px radius for cards, 8px for buttons, and 100px for badges/tags — these three radii define the system's silhouette.
Anchor body text in Inter 14–15px weight 400 at line-height 1.62; apply 600 only for inline emphasis, never for full paragraphs.
Layer the signature soft shadow (rgba(239,239,239,0.55) 0 2px 15px) beneath white cards on the warm canvas; avoid hard borders on elevated surfaces.
Use #f7f7f7 as the page background and #ffffff for cards to preserve the warm off-white analog feel — never pure #ffffff for full-page canvas.
donts: Don't use #000000 for body or heading text — #171618 is the only ink color; pure black is reserved for CTA fills and the logo mark.
Don't introduce bright or saturated accent colors (electric blue, neon green, etc.) — every chromatic value in the system is a deep, muted jewel tone.
Don't set body or product UI text in Eudoxus Sans — it's a display face only; Inter handles everything from 12px captions up to 27px sub-headings.
Don't use sharp 4px or 0px corner radii on cards or inputs — the system's softness comes from 20px / 12px / 8px curves.
Don't stack multiple colored CTA buttons in the same view; the system is strictly one filled black action plus ghost/outlined secondary actions per surface.
Don't apply gradients to backgrounds or buttons — the color palette relies on flat deep tones and their tinted washes for depth.
Don't use the chromatic brand colors for decorative gradients or large background floods — they belong on text, icons, and small accent elements paired with their tinted wash.

colors.name: Ink Black
colors.role: Primary text, icons, dark surfaces — the dominant neutral; never use pure #000 for text

colors.name: Pure Black
colors.role: Dark supporting neutral for text, icons, and strong contrast. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

colors.name: Paper White
colors.role: Card surfaces, modal panels, text on dark buttons — the brightest surface in the stack

colors.name: Warm Canvas
colors.role: Page background, subtle section divider — the off-white that gives the system its warm analog feel

colors.name: Mist Gray
colors.role: Hairline borders, input backgrounds, divider lines — the quietest structural neutral

colors.name: Stone Gray
colors.role: Button borders, disabled outlines

colors.name: Pewter
colors.role: Subtle shadow tint, placeholder text in low-emphasis contexts

colors.name: Iron
colors.role: Secondary text, nav links, muted body copy — the workhorse mid-gray

colors.name: Lead
colors.role: Tertiary nav, breadcrumb separators

colors.name: Pebble
colors.role: Badge text, metadata labels

colors.name: Deep Teal
colors.role: Product accent — Pathfinder agent, data-viz category, teal-tinted section backgrounds pair it

colors.name: Deep Violet
colors.role: Product accent — VoiceHunter agent, primary feature category, violet wash sections

colors.name: Deep Amber
colors.role: Product accent — LoopCloser agent, gold-tinted section backgrounds and warm callouts

colors.name: Deep Plum
colors.role: Product accent — additional agent or feature category, paired with pinkish washes

colors.name: Deep Navy
colors.role: Product accent — analytics or infrastructure category

colors.name: Deep Maroon
colors.role: Product accent — heading accent on warm-toned pages

colors.name: Deep Umber
colors.role: Product accent — rust-toned category, icon and illustration accent

colors.name: Deep Indigo
colors.role: Product accent — dark variant of the violet for headings and iconography on light surfaces

colors.name: Burnt Sienna
colors.role: Dark amber — heading text when a warm-tone treatment is needed; Yellow supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

colors.name: Violet Wash
colors.role: Soft tinted background — feature section panels, agent card backgrounds

colors.name: Teal Mist
colors.role: Soft tinted background — teal-categorized section panels

colors.name: Amber Cream
colors.role: Soft tinted background — gold-categorized section panels

colors.name: Apricot Wash
colors.role: Soft tinted background — warm secondary section panels

colors.name: Violet Veil
colors.role: Badge and small-card background — violet category

colors.name: Sky Tint
colors.role: Badge and small-card background — teal category

colors.name: Honey Veil
colors.role: Gray supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

designSystem.layout: Max-width 1200px centered column, hero breaks full-bleed with the nav pill floating above. Hero is a centered stack: small wordmark + nav, then 58px headline, subtitle, and a two-button group, flanked by mascot characters sitting outside the content column. Below the hero, a monochrome customer-logo band runs edge-to-edge in a quiet row. Product sections alternate between white product-screenshot cards on the warm canvas and full-bleed tinted sections (violet / teal / amber / apricot) that hold 3-column agent card grids. Section gaps are generous (~80px) to let the soft shadows breathe. Navigation is a minimal top bar with no sticky behavior apparent; in-product pages switch to a left sidebar with a workspace switcher at the top.
designSystem.imagery: The site's visual language mixes three modes: (1) 3D mascot characters in the hero — soft, rounded blob creatures with expressive faces and hats, rendered in the full deep-jewel palette (teal, violet, amber, pink) with subtle ambient shadows; they float as isolated characters with small geometric confetti shapes, never composited onto backgrounds. (2) Product UI screenshots — crisp, full-bleed captures of the actual Cycle workspace showing feedback lists, sidebars, and search inputs, presented in white card frames on the warm canvas. (3) Iconography — small, line-based icons throughout the product UI at 16–20px stroke weight, monochrome #171618 or matching the active category color. No photography, no abstract gradient art, no illustration beyond the mascots. Imagery is sparse and purposeful: mascots anchor brand warmth, product screenshots do the explanatory heavy lifting, icons carry functional density.

similar.why: Same warm off-white canvas and heavy display heading against a quiet, mostly-monochrome product frame
Same approach of one dark CTA button per view with ghost secondaries, and the soft warm-gray shadow system beneath white cards
Same category-coded color washes on neutral surfaces, with deep muted hues rather than bright SaaS accents
Same soft 20px card radii, Inter for body, custom display face for headlines, and a warm canvas that reads analog rather than digital
Same use of 3D character mascots as brand warmth, paired with a clean, generous white-and-warm-gray layout

surfaces.name: Warm Canvas
surfaces.purpose: Page background — the off-white that grounds everything

surfaces.name: Paper White
surfaces.purpose: Card, modal, and elevated component surfaces

surfaces.name: Tinted Wash
surfaces.purpose: Category-coded section backgrounds — violet, teal, amber, apricot variants

surfaces.name: Ink Overlay
surfaces.purpose: Dark inverted sections and product mockup frames

designSystem.northStar: Ink-stained porcelain workshop with jewel-toned labels

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.role: Main action — Book a demo, Sign up
components.description: Solid #000000 fill, #ffffff text at 14px Inter weight 500, 8px corner radius, 22px horizontal / 10px vertical padding. Subtle two-stop drop shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.08) + 0 0.5px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.12). No border.

components.name: Ghost / Outlined Button
components.role: Secondary action — Watch video, Explore product agents
components.description: Transparent fill, #171618 border at 1px, 8px corner radius, 22px / 10px padding, 14px Inter weight 500. Pairs beside the primary CTA in the hero.

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Transparent bar on white canvas, logo left (#000000 mark), nav links in Inter 14px/500 #171618, right side hosts Log in link and a compact primary CTA button.

components.name: Logo Mark
components.description: The Cycle dot+wordmark in #000000 — a small circle glyph followed by 'Cycle' in Inter 14px/600; reappears in the product UI as an in-app breadcrumb mark.

components.name: Hero Section
components.description: Full-width white canvas, centered 58px Eudoxus Sans 800 headline ('Together we ship alone'), 21px Inter 400 subtitle in #727578, two-button group centered. Flanked by 3D mascot characters (jewel-toned blob faces with hats) — decorative, not part of the grid.

components.name: Customer Logo Strip
components.description: Two rows of monochrome #727578 / 60%-opacity customer logos on the warm canvas, no dividers, 21px row gap.

components.name: Product Screenshot Card
components.description: White card on warm canvas, 20px radius, 24px padding, 12px image radius inside, soft layered shadow (1px ink hairline + 16px/6px warm blurs). Hosts the product UI mockup showing feedback organization.

components.name: Category Tinted Section
components.description: Full-bleed tinted background — one of #f5f0ff, #defafe, #fff6e1, or #fff1ec — with a 20px-radius card inside, 3-column or 3-row layout, each card representing a product agent with its matching deep-jewel accent.

components.name: Agent / Feature Card
components.description: White surface on tinted background, 20px radius, 24px padding, Eudoxus Sans 800 32px heading in a deep brand color, Inter 14–15px body in #171618, optional small badge with 100px pill radius in tinted accent.

components.name: Category Badge
components.role: Inline tag for area, source, or status
components.description: 100px pill radius, tinted background (one of #e7e0fe, #cfeff8, #feedcc), 12px Inter 500 text in the matching deep ink color, 6px vertical / 9px horizontal padding.

components.name: Primary Nav Link
components.description: Inter 14px weight 500, #171618, no underline; chevron-down icons next to dropdown items; active state uses weight 600.

components.name: In-Product Sidebar Item
components.role: Workspace navigation inside the product UI
components.description: Inter 13px weight 500, #171618, left-aligned with a small leading icon, 8px vertical padding, subtle hover wash in #f7f7f7.

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Full-width input with 1px #efefef border, 20px radius, 12px Inter 400 placeholder in #727578, 12px vertical / 14px horizontal padding, focus state deepens border to #171618.

components.name: Filter Pill
components.role: Active filter chip in the product UI
components.description: Pill shape (100px radius), white fill, 1px #efefef border, 12px Inter 500 text, small trailing X icon in #727578.

typography.role: All UI, body, nav, button, and badge text — body at 14–16px/400, nav and labels at 12–13px/500, button text at 14–16px/500, inline emphasized text at 600

All display and heading copy — hero at 58px/800, section headings at 48px/800, sub-headings at 32px/700; the tight -0.035em tracking at display sizes and heavy weight give headlines physical, sculptural presence that contrasts Inter's workhorse body
typography.substitute: Cabinet Grotesk Bold, Söhne Breit, or Plus Jakarta Sans 800

typography.role: Karla — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

designSystem.description: Cycle's visual language reads as a warm, analog workspace — slightly off-white canvas, ink-black type, and a palette of deep jewel tones that feel more like vintage inkpots than SaaS accents. Headlines use Eudoxus Sans at heavy weights with tight tracking, giving every title physical weight; body and UI default to Inter at comfortable 14–16px. Components sit on a very soft shadow system (low-opacity warm gray) rather than hard borders, and large 20px corner radii make cards feel like ceramic tiles. Color is functional and categorical — each product agent or feature cluster gets its own deep hue (teal, violet, amber, maroon) and its own tinted background wash, never decorative gradients.

- text: #171618
- background: #f7f7f7 (canvas) / #ffffff (card)
- border: #efefef (hairline) / #171618 (strong)
- accent: #38296c (Deep Violet) — paired with #f5f0ff wash
- primary action: no distinct CTA color

Example Component Prompts:
1. Build the hero: #ffffff background, centered 58px Eudoxus Sans weight 800 headline in #171618 at letter-spacing -2.03px, 21px Inter weight 400 subtitle in #727578 with 1.62 line-height, and a centered button pair — primary #000000 filled button with #ffffff text at 14px Inter 500 (8px radius, 22px/10px padding) and a ghost button with 1px #171618 border, same sizing. Flank with 3D mascot characters in violet, teal, and amber.

2. Build a category-tinted section: #f5f0ff full-bleed background, 3-column grid of white cards (20px radius, 24px padding, soft shadow rgba(239,239,239,0.55) 0 2px 15px), each card with a 32px Eudoxus Sans 800 heading in #38296c, 15px Inter 400 body in #171618, and a 100px-radius pill badge using #e7e0fe fill with #38296c text.

3. Build a product screenshot card: white card (20px radius, 24px padding) on the #f7f7f7 canvas, containing a product UI mockup with 12px image radius and a layered shadow (1px #171618 at 10% opacity + 16px and 6px warm blurs at 3–5% opacity). Inside the mockup, a left sidebar with 13px Inter 500 items in #171618, a top search input with 20px radius and 1px #efefef border, and a main panel with Eudoxus Sans 21px weight 700 headings.

No distinct primary action color was observed; use the extracted neutral button treatments instead of inventing a filled CTA color.

5. Build a category badge: 100px pill radius, #feedcc fill, 12px Inter 500 text in #412e0a, 6px vertical / 9px horizontal padding. Use for area, source, or status tagging inside the product UI.

customSections.title: Color Categorical System
customSections.content:
Cycle's chromatic palette is not a decorative accent set — it is a categorical taxonomy. Each product agent or feature cluster is assigned one deep-jewel hue and one matching tinted wash:

- Deep Violet (#38296c) + Violet Wash (#f5f0ff) → VoiceHunter / understanding customers
- Deep Teal (#004d60) + Teal Mist (#defafe) → Pathfinder / shaping the product
- Deep Amber (#6c4800) + Amber Cream (#fff6e1) → LoopCloser / closing the loop
- Deep Plum (#46122d) + Apricot Wash (#fff1ec) → additional agent or feedback category
- Deep Navy (#0f1c41) → analytics or infrastructure category

When adding a new agent or feature cluster, select a new deep hue and generate its 95%-lightened wash. Never reuse a hue for a second category. UI chrome (buttons, nav, body) stays neutral; chromatic color enters the interface only through this agent/category system.

customSections.title: Typography Pairing Logic
customSections.content:
The Eudoxus Sans + Inter pairing is a contrast play, not a harmony. Eudoxus Sans 700–800 with tight tracking (-0.035em at display sizes) gives every heading a sculptural, almost pressed-letter quality — the kind of voice you see on a wine label or architecture monograph. Inter at 400–500 with looser tracking handles everything the user reads or clicks.

Rules for the pair:
- Headlines never use Inter; UI never uses Eudoxus Sans.
- The transition point is 27–32px: at 27px and below use Inter; at 32px and above use Eudoxus Sans.
- Eudoxus Sans is always weight 700 or 800 — never lighter.
- Inter at 21px or 27px sub-heading sizes gets -0.011em tracking, which is enough to feel intentional without becoming display-style.
